name: Strale
description: Trust and quality infrastructure for AI agents. 250+ quality-scored capabilities for validation, compliance, enrichment, and Web3 — each with dual-profile quality scores and audit trails.

bearer_auth.description: Strale API key (starts with sk_live_). Get one at https://strale.dev/signup.

skills.name: Validate IBAN
skills.description: Validate international bank account numbers with checksum verification, bank identification, and country detection.

skills.name: Company Lookup
skills.description: Look up company registration data from official registries across 27 countries.

skills.name: Sanctions Screening
skills.description: Screen individuals and entities against OFAC, EU, UN, and UK sanctions lists.

skills.name: PEP Check
skills.description: Screen individuals against Politically Exposed Persons databases.
examples: Check if Anders Andersson is a PEP

skills.name: Validate VAT
skills.description: Validate European VAT numbers via VIES with company name and address lookup.

skills.name: Web Data Extraction
skills.description: Extract structured data from web pages, convert URLs to markdown, take screenshots.

skills.name: Domain Intelligence
skills.description: WHOIS lookup, DNS records, SSL certificate analysis, domain reputation scoring.

skills.name: Web3 Risk Analysis
skills.description: Wallet risk scoring, token honeypot detection, DeFi protocol intelligence, ENS resolution.
examples: Check if token contract is a honeypot
